place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Ocean-View Villa with Beach Bale, Pantai Lima - Canggu
blurb: A freshly refurbished five-bedroom beachfront villa at Pantai Lima — open-plan living with surround sound over two levels, a poolside lounge and beachfront bale for private massage, with ocean views and direct steps to the black sand.
detail:
This five-bedroom beachfront villa sits within a four-acre beachfront estate, refreshed in 2024 and spread across two levels. The ground floor holds a semi-open indoor living area with surround sound, a fully equipped kitchen, enclosed air-conditioned dining, the master and two further bedrooms, plus the pool and garden; two more bedrooms sit on the upper level. Each en-suite bedroom has a Smart TV with Netflix and its own sound system.

The living spaces flow effortlessly to the outdoors — a poolside lounge and dining area with beach and ocean views, and a beachfront bale that makes a serene haven for private massages. With the sea just steps away across the estate's boardwalk, it balances open-air Bali living with air-conditioned comfort throughout.

Fully staffed with a private chef, attendants, housekeepers, maintenance and security, the villa includes daily breakfast and shared access to the estate's night-lit tennis court. In-villa spa treatments, yoga, a chef shopping service and tours can all be arranged on request, making it an effortless beachfront base for families and groups.
